steps.title: Close the dash pair
steps.content: The dash after photographs opens a supplementary phrase explaining what Calle photographed. That inserted phrase must be closed before the main sentence continues with to powerful effect in her exhibition.

steps.title: Reject broken punctuation
steps.content: Choice A never closes the dash pair. Choice C uses a dash inside the supplement and then a comma where the closing dash is needed. Choice D uses a colon after a non-independent clause and still leaves the dash unclosed. The answer is B.
